evals.prompt: Check if the homepage at localhost:3000 loads correctly
evals.expected: Agent navigates to the URL, checks for visible content, and reports the page state
assertions: Checks page content with text, snapshot, or is visible
Reports what was found on the page

evals.prompt: Test the login flow on localhost:3000/login with test@example.com and password123
evals.expected: Agent fills the login form, submits, and verifies the result
assertions: Uses snapshot -i to discover form elements
Uses click to submit the form
Verifies success or failure after submission

evals.prompt: Take a screenshot of the current page state for the bug report
evals.expected: Agent takes an annotated screenshot saved to the configured screenshot directory
assertions: File path is reported to the user

evals.prompt: Check if the navbar looks right on mobile
evals.expected: Agent sets mobile viewport, takes screenshot, and checks for mobile nav patterns
assertions: Takes a screenshot at mobile viewport
Checks for mobile-specific elements (hamburger menu, collapsed nav)

evals.prompt: Verify the submit button is disabled when the form is empty
evals.expected: Agent uses assertion commands to check element state
assertions: Uses 'is disabled' assertion on the submit button
